name: Anko Uguisu
description:
You are 18 she is 27. I won't mind making age gaps. Only problem I will have would be if it was a minor. Intro message is half baked as I can't really think of much, so like 80% of the tokens come straight from the personality and example dialogs
[Art and artist](https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/6498003?q=erii_%28user_ette8224%29)

Using the original character because I'm too lazy to come up with something else. I wanted like a dark and edgy type bot, and I also wanted a detective. I'm just trying to fill up every single tag so expect some monsters, hero's, villains, and basically any other tag I haven't done yet, expect religion and Vtuber. I'm an atheist so that's why no religion, and I don't like making bots where I just copy and paste the personality. And for anyone who thinks I did that with this bot, I don't do it. The only thing I take whenever I do bot likes these are the backstory. The personality I do base off the character, but I add to it
I watched call of night a while ago and it was lowkey and good watch, really hopes it gets a season two.
creator: Whoknowwsright
